questions.text: Write two sentences about your favourite fruit.
questions.answer: Example: My favourite fruit is mango. It is sweet and yellow.

questions.text: Look at the word 'SUN'. Write one sentence using this word.
questions.answer: Example: The sun gives us light and heat in the day.

questions.text:
Assertion (A): 'Apple' begins with the letter A.
Reason (R): A is the first letter of the English alphabet.
options: Both A and R are true and R explains A
Both A and R are true but R does not explain A
A is true but R is false
A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Both statements are true, but R (A being first letter) does not explain why 'apple' starts with A.

questions.text: Match the word with its opposite.
Match the animal with the sound it makes.
There are 26 letters in the English alphabet.
questions.explanation: Yes, A to Z is 26 letters. True.

questions.text: 'Banana' is the name of a vegetable.
questions.explanation: Banana is a fruit, not a vegetable. False.

questions.text: A baby dog is called a ____.
questions.explanation: A baby dog is a puppy.
